_comment: PRYZM 2 — S09 small-project fixture (T1). Single wall, no openings, no system-type. Used by `apps/bench/src/benches/load-small.bench.ts` to assert the cold-load + first-commit latency budget. Schema-shaped (Wall.parse-clean) but stripped of metadata defaults to keep the file diffable. The bench rehydrates via `Wall.parse(...)` so any missing zod-default field is filled in by the schema, NOT by this fixture.
